title: Personal Trainer (Tanjong Pagar, Tiong Bahru, Queenstown)
description:
StringsSG is on a mission to deliver high-quality, mobile personal training across Singapore — at client homes, condo gyms, and outdoor spaces. We’re not a gym. We bring fitness to the client.

We’re looking for a high-performing Personal Trainer based in Singapore to lead both training delivery and client success. As one of the early full-time trainers on our growing team, you’ll not only provide top-tier coaching, but also manage new leads, conduct trial sessions, and convert them into long-term clients.

This is a unique opportunity for a certified trainer who wants to go beyond coaching — and grow with a tech-enabled fitness startup that puts client experience first.

Note: The majority of clients in this role are female, and sessions often involve 1-on-1 training in homes or private spaces. As such, a female trainer is preferred to better align with client comfort and preferences.

💼 Key Responsibilities

🏋️‍♂️ Personal Training & Coaching

  • Deliver 1-on-1 personal training at homes, condo gyms, or outdoor locations
  • Primary service areas: Punggol, Sengkang, Hougang, Serangoon (with occasional nearby travel)
  • Customize fitness programs based on client goals and fitness level
  • Motivate, track progress, and ensure safe, effective workouts
  • Deliver engaging trial sessions that demonstrate value and build trust

🤝 Lead Handling & Client Conversion

  • Serve as the first point of contact for new personal training leads assigned by the company
  • Coordinate and schedule trial sessions within 2–3 days of lead assignment
  • Follow up with trial clients to answer questions, handle objections, and convert them into paid packages
  • Track lead status and conversion performance using CRM or reporting tools

📈 Growth & Brand Support

  • Upsell renewals and higher-tier packages
  • Collect client testimonials and feedback
  • Create basic fitness content (photos, tips, IG Reels)
  • Represent StringsSG at roadshows, demos, or pop-up events
  • Support the onboarding of new trainers in future

💰 Compensation

Base Salary:
▸ Competitive base salary (Commensurate with experience, certifications, and performance)

Per-Session Commission (Tiered):
▸ Commission is calculated monthly based on total completed sessions:

👉 Higher session volume unlocks higher commission rates.

Travel Allowance:

▸ Travel allowance provided to cover islandwide commuting between client locations

Monthly Earning Potential:
▸ Up to $4000 - $6,000/month (including base salary, tiered per-session commissions, and travel allowance)

🎯 Requirements

  • Personal Training Certification (ACE, NASM, NCSF, etc.)
  • CPR/AED certification (or willing to get one)
  • 1 year of experience as a certified personal trainer
  • Experience in customizing fitness programs for diverse clients (weight loss, strength, mobility, etc.)
  • Familiar with trial sessions, goal setting, and progress tracking
  • Excellent communication and follow-up skills
  • Confident handling trial leads and upselling packages
  • Willing to travel islandwide for sessions

🧠 Preferred / Ideal

  • 1+ years experience including:
    Freelance PT work or gym-based personal training
    Some exposure to client sales, rebooking, or upselling packages
  • Track record of client retention or referrals
  • Comfortable with basic digital tools: CRM apps, booking platforms, or Excel
  • Experience creating social content (e.g. IG reels, workout tips) a strong plus

📍 Work Environment

  • Training takes place across Singapore — in condo gyms, client homes, ActiveSG gyms, Gym pods or parks
  • Admin, follow-ups, and scheduling can be handled remotely or during off-peak hours

Company Website - https://www.stringssg.com

Personal Training Segment - https://www.stringssg.com/sg/personal-trainer
